784827-784827==I[V]then I[V],S[V]=nil,nil end end,function(V,e)local y=v(e)local t=function(t,W,m)return L(V,{t,W;m},e,y)end return t end,function(V,e)local y=v(e)local t=function(t,W,m,p)return L(V,{t,W;m;p},e,y)end return t end return(O(-673583+11484729,{}))(y(j))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[e(508418+-569342)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
